element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Click-based interaction with logo letters and screen elements triggers Easter eggs
Fly-swatting mechanics; 100 insects across 3 levels; difficulty increases on subsequent cycles with faster enemy behavior
Pen (small/medium/large), airbrush, fill tool, shape tools (line, rectangle, circle)
15 colors and 75 patterns available for all drawing operations
Copy, paste, move, rotate (vertical/horizontal), erase with 6 eraser sizes, clear entire canvas with 9 visual effects

element_introduction_order.first_appears: Integrated with drawing and animation tools
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: 120 pre-made stamps; user can create/edit stamps via stamp editor; up to 15 custom stamps saveable
English, Hiragana, Katakana, Kanji characters with size and color customization
4 pre-made black-and-white drawings (Yoshi/Mario, animals, greeting card, underwater scene)
4, 6, or 9-frame animations; frame-to-frame element copying; path lever feature for character movement across backgrounds
Common time or triple time; 15 instrument samples with Mario-themed icons; treble clef notation; C major/A minor scale only (no flats/sharps)

typical_relief_triggers: Exiting minigame to return to creative tools
typical_tension_triggers: Difficulty increase when repeating Gnat Attack cycles
Data overflow error when canvas becomes too large/detailed
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Gnat Attack provides cyclical tension with escalating difficulty; creative tools offer open-ended, non-linear pacing with no inherent time pressure

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Easter eggs hidden in title screen (clickable logo letters and UI elements)
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Right-click functionality unlocked via staff roll code; hidden right-mouse-button features (Undodog, color sampling, additional rotation options)

difficulty_curve.early_game: Gnat Attack Level 1 introduces basic fly-swatting at manageable speed; title screen interaction teaches mouse fundamentals
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Gnat Attack Levels 2-3 increase insect density and attack speed; creative tools offer progressive complexity through tool combinations
difficulty_curve.late_game: Gnat Attack cycles repeat with exponentially faster enemy behavior; creative tool mastery depends on user experimentation rather than prescribed progression
notable_spikes: Gnat Attack King Watinga boss encounter
Cycle restarts with increased enemy speed
Data overflow error when canvas compression exceeds 32KB SRAM

notable_level_patterns.description: Minigame consists of 3 escalating levels; defeating all 3 triggers cycle restart with faster enemy behavior; no progress save between attempts; boss encounter at cycle completion
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Gnat Attack (all 3 levels + King Watinga boss)

notable_level_patterns.description: Multiple interactive elements on title screen trigger hidden features; requires specific input sequences (clicking logo letters, staff roll code with right-click + Mario click) to unlock functionality
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Title screen (contains Nintendo! audio Easter egg, right-button unlock code location)

notable_level_patterns.description: No mandatory sequence for using drawing, animation, coloring, or music tools; user can approach any content creation mode at any time; mastery determined by experimentation rather than level gates
notable_level_patterns.example_level: All creative tool menus (drawing board, Animation Land, coloring book, music composer)

sources_used: tcrf (The Cutting Room Floor - Mario Paint article)
